sections.label: What ICOS Is
sections.title: What ICOS Is
sections.description: Defines ICOS as a new category: a voice-trained continuity system for reflection, profile intelligence, and long-term cognitive development.

sections.label: Core Framing
sections.title: Core Framing
sections.description: Positions ICOS as a governed product architecture focused on continuity, structured reflection, and premium cognitive tooling rather than generic conversation.

sections.label: Reflection Loop
sections.title: Reflection Loop
sections.description: Explains the product’s core interaction cycle: capture, reflection, continuity review, and long-term profile refinement.

sections.label: Profile Intelligence
sections.title: Profile Intelligence
sections.description: Describes how ICOS turns reflection, memory, and identity signals into a governed profile layer rather than a simple account surface.

sections.label: Voice Training
sections.title: Voice Training
sections.description: Frames voice training as core infrastructure for continuity, identity fidelity, and long-term interaction quality.

sections.label: Public Discovery
sections.title: Public Discovery
sections.description: Introduces guest interaction, searchable profile surfaces, and discovery pathways as commercial entry points into ICOS.

sections.label: Permissions & Trust
sections.title: Permissions & Trust
sections.description: Defines visibility states, permission architecture, and trust boundaries as core product systems rather than secondary settings.

sections.label: Legacy Continuity
sections.title: Legacy Continuity
sections.description: Presents governed legacy continuity as a serious continuation model shaped by permissions, profile maturity, and long-term preservation.

sections.label: Release
sections.title: Release
sections.description: Defines the current public release layer and what is presently exposed as the market-facing introduction to ICOS.

sections.label: Version
sections.title: Version
sections.description: Clarifies the current version posture of the product architecture and how the public surface relates to deeper product maturity.

sections.label: Status
sections.title: Status
sections.description: States the present maturity state of ICOS across concept architecture, public framing, continuity systems, and future development readiness.
